The show concludes with a heavy cast-iron monkey ashtray that vents smoke through its nostrils, with the hosts highlighting the unexpected affordability of all the products.

item.media:title: Creekside Cigar Co - What Is A Cooked Cigar Wrapper And Does It Taste Better
item.media:description: In this episode of the Creekside Podcast, hosts Dave and Scott explore the differences between natural and "cooked" Mexican San Andrés cigar wrappers. They explain that the cooking process, known as vapor rosado, uses steam to darken the leaf into a uniform, dark chocolate brown hue while enhancing sweetness and depth in the final blend.

item.media:title: The Cigar Guys Podcast - How We Rate Cigars
item.media:description: Hosts Alex Gonzalez, Mark Alcala, and Jeff Borowicz discuss the topic of vintage cigars, defining what makes a cigar truly vintage. They delve into the aging process of tobacco and cigars, explaining how time and storage conditions influence the final flavor and smoking experience.
item.media:keywords: Lifestyle, Review, Cigars, The Cigar Guys Podcast , How We Rate Cigars

item.media:title: The Cigar Guys Podcast - What Are Vintage Cigars
item.media:description: On this episode of The Cigar Guys Podcast, Alec and Jarred discuss how they rate cigars and what factors they consider. They talk about the importance of construction, burn, ash, flavor, and enjoyment. Alec talks about how he rates a cigar based on the construction and how it burns, while Jarred talks about how he rates a cigar on whether it provides a good smoking experience and a good blend of flavors, specifically mentioning a hint of sweetness.
item.media:keywords: Lifestyle, Review, Cigars, The Cigar Guys Podcast , What Are Vintage Cigars

item.media:title: The Cigar Guys Podcast - Truth About Cigar Flavor Notes
item.media:description: Alex and Jarred discuss how they rate cigars and the factors they consider when doing so. Alec focuses on construction and burn, while Jarred prioritizes a good smoking experience and a good blend of flavors, with a hint of sweetness. They also discuss a special blend from a company called Perdomo that has been aged for seven years and is considered a great cigar for a special occasion.
item.media:keywords: Lifestyle, Review, Cigars, The Cigar Guys Podcast , Truth About Cigar Flavor Notes

item.media:title: The Cigar Guys Podcast - Ranking Best Cigar Smokers
item.media:description: Alex and Jon discuss the subjective nature of cigar flavor notes. They emphasize that tasting notes are based on personal memory and experience, and there is no right or wrong answer. They also talk about how marketing and packaging can influence a person's perception of a cigar's flavor. The hosts share anecdotes about unusual flavors they've encountered, like "gun taste" and "peanut butter and jelly," and argue that what matters most is consistency and a positive smoking experience.
item.media:keywords: Lifestyle, Review, Cigars, The Cigar Guys Podcast , Ranking Best Cigar Smokers

item.media:title: The Cigar Guys Podcast - Albanian Wedding
item.media:description: In this episode the guys discuss and rank famous cigar smokers, both real and fictional. They talk about historical figures like Winston Churchill and Fidel Castro, as well as fictional characters, and debate who would make it onto their "Mount Rushmore" of cigar smokers. The hosts also touch on other topics such as marketing, social media, and the importance of a consistent smoking experience.
item.media:keywords: Lifestyle, Review, Cigars, The Cigar Guys Podcast , Albanian Wedding

They talk about the food, the decorations, and the music, comparing them to American traditions. They also mention an event where they were supposed to work but instead just hung out, and they share a few other anecdotes about their personal lives and a crazy night out on the town.

item.media:title: Unrolled - Ol Times Cigars
item.media:description: Go behind the counter at Old Times Cigars in Casselberry, Florida, with father-son owners Alan and Jonathan. Alan shares the story of how he transitioned from real estate to the cigar business in 1988, starting with a tiny shop in downtown Orlando's Church Street Station.
item.media:keywords: Lifestyle, Review, Travel, Documentary, Cigars, Ol Times Cigars

item.media:title: Unrolled - Quality Importers Trading Company
item.media:description: This episode explores Quality Importers, a comprehensive provider of cigar accessories, showcasing their diverse product lines, in-house customization services, and new "Conspiracy" cigar brand, all built on a foundation of strategic acquisitions and a passion for the cigar lifestyle.
item.media:keywords: Lifestyle, Review, Travel, Documentary, Cigars, Quality Importers Trading Company

item.media:title: Unrolled - Vicente Of London
item.media:description: Vito Vicente of London in Naples, Florida, is a cigar lounge offering a wide selection of premium cigars, personalized locker service, and a welcoming atmosphere with ample seating, both indoors and by a scenic pond.
item.media:keywords: Lifestyle, Review, Travel, Documentary, Cigars, Vicente Of London

item.media:title: Unrolled - Miura Cigars
item.media:description: Miura Cigars in Miami is a unique cigar lounge and distribution center, specializing in hard-to-find and boutique cigars, while offering a wide selection of premium brands and actively engaging with the local community.
item.media:keywords: Lifestyle, Review, Travel, Documentary, Cigars, Miura Cigars

item.media:title: Unrolled - Isabela's Fine Imported Cigars
item.media:description: Isabela's Bar Cuba in St. Augustine is a unique cigar lounge and bar offering a curated selection of rare and premium cigars within a comfortable, home-like atmosphere, all while celebrating Cuban heritage and fostering strong community connections.
item.media:keywords: Lifestyle, Review, Travel, Documentary, Cigars, Isabela's Fine Imported Cigars

item.media:title: Unrolled - Gurkha Cigars
item.media:description: This episode explores Gurkha cigars' collaborative "Year of the Dragon 2024" series, featuring partnerships with master blenders and showcasing the brand's innovative packaging, promotional strategies, and dedication to the broader cigar community.
item.media:keywords: Lifestyle, Review, Travel, Documentary, Cigars, Gurkha Cigars

item.media:title: Unrolled - Jc Newman Handrolling Class
item.media:description: In this special edition of Unrolled. Brain and Sean go head to head at handrolling their best cigars at El Reloj Cigar Factory.
item.media:keywords: Lifestyle, Review, Travel, Documentary, Cigars, Jc Newman Handrolling Class

item.media:title: Unrolled - Smoke on the Water Miami
item.media:description: Host Sean Mobley visits Smoke on the Water in Weston, Florida, to explore the lounge's waterfront atmosphere and extensive humidor. General Manager Larry and cigar expert Joaquin discuss premium brands like Padron and Placencia, the venue's spirit collection, and the communal nature of cigar culture.
item.media:keywords: Lifestyle, Review, Travel, Documentary, Cigars, Smoke on the Water Miami

item.media:title: Unrolled - Stogie Pairing Cigar Lounge
item.media:description: In this episode of Unrolled, Sean Mobley visits Stogie Pairing Cigar Lounge in Fort Myers, Florida, where owners Joey and Jessica showcase their establishment, boasting 28 beer taps, 75 types of bottled and canned beers, and a full wine selection, emphasizing their commitment to diverse pairings for cigars.
item.media:keywords: Lifestyle, Review, Travel, Documentary, Cigars, Stogie Pairing Cigar Lounge

item.media:title: Unrolled - King Corona Cigars Bar and Cafe
item.media:description: Join Sean Mobley and Kyle Lenz as they tour King Corona Cigars, Bar and Coffee in Ybor City, Florida.. Check out the latest in cigars and learn what sets the lounge apart from the rest.
item.media:keywords: Lifestyle, Review, Travel, Documentary, Cigars, King Corona Cigars Bar and Cafe

item.media:title: Unrolled - Captains Cigar Lounge
item.media:description: Sean visits Captain's Cigar Lounge in downtown Clearwater, Florida, and speaks with General Manager Glenn. Glenn, who moved to Tallahassee for college before settling in Clearwater, discusses the lounge's recent expansion into offering a full liquor bar, focusing on pairings like whiskey, scotch, bourbon, and rye.
item.media:keywords: Lifestyle, Review, Travel, Documentary, Cigars, Captains Cigar Lounge

item.media:title: Unrolled - Black Leaf Cigar and Wine Lounge
item.media:description: Black Leaf Cigar and Wine Lounge in downtown St. Pete offers a unique and welcoming experience with its self-service wine system, curated cigar selection including house blends made with Davidoff tobacco, and a strong emphasis on community and quality for all patrons.
item.media:keywords: Lifestyle, Review, Travel, Documentary, Cigars, Black Leaf Cigar and Wine Lounge

item.media:title: Unrolled - Stogies Cigars
item.media:description: Stogie Smoke Shop in St. Augustine offers a welcoming, home-like atmosphere with a wide selection of cigars, including popular brands and unique hand-rolled house blends, along with pipe tobacco, catering to both local regulars and tourists.
item.media:keywords: Lifestyle, Review, Travel, Documentary, Cigars, Stogies Cigars

item.media:title: Unrolled - Leaf And Bean By Island Jim
item.media:description: In this episode of "Unrolled," Sean Mobley visits Leaf and Bean by Island Jim in St. Augustine, Florida, interviewing co-owner Jerry Hauman about the lounge's serendipitous opening in a former Italian restaurant. Jerry discusses the unique Island Jim cigar line, including the "number two pencil" Corojo, San Andres, and Connecticut blends.
item.media:keywords: Lifestyle, Review, Travel, Documentary, Cigars, Leaf And Bean By Island Jim

item.media:title: Unrolled - Rocky Patel Headquarters
item.media:description: In this episode, Sean visits Rocky Patel Headquarters in Naples, Florida, speaking with Purchasing Manager Sean Bustler about the company's growth, extensive award collection, and the intricate process of cigar production and distribution, including managing a 41,000 square foot facility housing 12 million cigars.
item.media:keywords: Lifestyle, Review, Travel, Documentary, Cigars, Rocky Patel Headquarters

item.media:title: Unrolled - Central Cigars And Ruby's Elixir
item.media:description: In this episode of Unrolled, Sean explores Central Cigars, a cornerstone of St. Petersburg's cigar scene, highlighting its rich history, expertly curated cigar selection, and the passionate community it fosters.
item.media:keywords: Lifestyle, Review, Travel, Documentary, Cigars, Central Cigars And Ruby's Elixir

item.media:title: Unrolled - Privada Cigar Club
item.media:description: Host Sean is joined by guest Brian Desind of Privada Cigar Club in Orlando, Florida. They discuss the value of community and fellowship within the cigar hobby and showcase the atmosphere of a Privada Cigar Club membership.
item.media:keywords: Lifestyle, Review, Travel, Documentary, Cigars, Privada Cigar Club

item.media:title: Unrolled - Admiral Cigar Club
item.media:description: In this episode of Unrolled, Sean visits Admiral Cigar Lounge in Orlando, Florida, and speaks with owner Miguel, who is a Marine veteran and UCF alumnus. Miguel shares that the lounge, which opened in 2016, is located in an area that was formerly a Naval Training Center and that the name "Admiral" is a tribute to that naval tradition and the military history of the area.
item.media:keywords: Lifestyle, Review, Travel, Documentary, Cigars, Admiral Cigar Club

item.media:title: Unrolled - Blend And Barrel
item.media:description: Blend and Barrel offers a variety of products including cigars, spirits, and beers. The lounge's bar is a "gorgeous" and "well-stocked" social space. The hosts and owners discuss how the business is focused on providing a welcoming environment for people to connect, which is something that separates them from other businesses.
item.media:keywords: Lifestyle, Review, Travel, Documentary, Cigars, Blend And Barrel

item.media:title: Unrolled - Old Fashion Cigars Lounge
item.media:description: Old Fashioned Cigars in St. Cloud, Florida is all about the customer's experience, not just selling products. They offer a wide variety of hand-made and premium cigars, including brands like Arturo Fuente and Romeo y Julieta.
item.media:keywords: Lifestyle, Review, Travel, Documentary, Cigars, Old Fashion Cigars Lounge

item.media:title: Unrolled - Casa De Montecristo Boca Raton
item.media:description: Casa de Montecristo in Boca Raton is a luxurious cigar lounge offering an extensive selection of premium cigars and high-end accessories, a vibrant community atmosphere with unique member benefits and frequent events, and a strong commitment to charitable initiatives.
item.media:keywords: Lifestyle, Review, Travel, Documentary, Cigars, Casa De Montecristo Boca Raton

item.media:title: Unrolled - El Titan De Bronze Cigar MFG
item.media:description: This episode of Unrolled Sean visits Titan de Bronze in Little Havana, Miami, to explore their cigar factory and production process. Owner Sandy Cobas and Sean discuss the unique challenges and traditions of cigar making in Miami. Sandy shares their family's history and the philosophy behind their highly regarded cigars.
item.media:keywords: Lifestyle, Review, Travel, Documentary, Cigars, El Titan De Bronze Cigar MFG

item.media:title: Unrolled - Marcus Daniel Cigar Merchant
item.media:description: In this episode of Unrolled, Sean visits Marcus Daniel Tobacconist in downtown Naples to explore their unique cigar offerings. Marcus Daniel, the President and Founder of Marcus Daniel Incorporated, discusses the company's various cigar collections, including the Miami collection's Habano and special Maduro blends.
item.media:keywords: Lifestyle, Review, Travel, Documentary, Cigars, Marcus Daniel Cigar Merchant

item.media:title: Unrolled - Caribbean Cigars
item.media:description: Caribbean Cigars in Miami distinguishes itself by specializing in boutique cigar brands, offering a diverse selection from smaller, innovative manufacturers alongside popular names, and providing personalized customer service to educate and guide new smokers.
item.media:keywords: Lifestyle, Review, Travel, Documentary, Cigars, Caribbean Cigars

item.media:title: Unrolled - The Cigar Box
item.media:description: The Cigar Box Lounge in Edgewood, Florida, offers a comfortable and community-focused cigar experience, featuring a wide selection of cigars, unique amenities like complimentary coffee and bottle service, and a strong commitment to exceptional customer service.
item.media:keywords: Lifestyle, Review, Travel, Documentary, Cigars, The Cigar Box

item.media:title: Unrolled - Aganorsa Leaf
item.media:description: This episode offers an inside look at Aganorsa Leaf's Miami operations, showcasing their tobacco processing, cigar blending expertise, and the new "Arsenio" cigar, while exploring Miami's unique cigar culture and the company's family-centric approach.
item.media:keywords: Lifestyle, Review, Travel, Documentary, Cigars, Aganorsa Leaf

item.media:title: Unrolled - Sabor Havana Miami
item.media:description: Sean visit Sabor Havana in Miami to interview the owner, Rudy Fernandez. They discuss the experience of running a thriving cigar lounge in Miami, focusing on the history and challenges of the cigar industry in the area. Rudy shares his knowledge of tobacco, the importance of cuban seed tobacco, and the necessity of maintaining high quality and consistency to satisfy customers.
item.media:keywords: Lifestyle, Review, Travel, Documentary, Cigars, Sabor Havana Miami

item.media:title: Unrolled - Maduro Cigar and Bar
item.media:description: On this episode of Cigar City Unrolled, owners of Maduro UTC - Paul and Dee Dee Gray - show off their shop in University Park, Florida. Including a custom-made bar and a state-of-the-art air filtration system! Join us as we explore this unique style for a cigar lounge!
item.media:keywords: Lifestyle, Review, Travel, Documentary, Cigars, Maduro Cigar and Bar

item.media:title: Unrolled - The Cigar Quarters
item.media:description: The Cigar Quarters in Haines City, Florida, offers a diverse selection of cigars, including rare and infused options, in a welcoming atmosphere created by owner Dr. Anthony Grant, who shares his personal connection to cigars as a source of focus and calm.
item.media:keywords: Lifestyle, Review, Travel, Documentary, Cigars, The Cigar Quarters

item.media:title: Unrolled - Cremo Cigar Factory
item.media:description: This episode visits Cremo Cigar Factory in Miami, showcasing the brand's long history, the intricate cigar-making process by master rollers, and their interactive "Cigar Factory Experience" which allows visitors to learn and hand-roll their own cigars.
item.media:keywords: Lifestyle, Review, Travel, Documentary, Cigars, Cremo Cigar Factory

item.media:title: Unrolled - Legacy Cigar Bar and Lounge
item.media:description: In this episode of Unrolled, Sean visits Legacy Cigar Bar and Lounge in Tavares, Florida, to speak with owner Andy Thompson. The discussion explores the shop's "million-dollar view" of Lake Dora, its community-focused atmosphere, and the curated selection of cigars and craft beverages available.
item.media:keywords: Lifestyle, Review, Travel, Documentary, Cigars, Legacy Cigar Bar and Lounge

item.media:title: Unrolled - Holy Shmokes And Noras Sugar Shack
item.media:description: Nora's Sugar Shack in Orlando offers a unique and welcoming "second home" experience, blending a diverse selection of cigars, wines, and beers with a strong emphasis on community, personal connection, and local support.
item.media:keywords: Lifestyle, Review, Travel, Documentary, Holy Shmokes And Noras Sugar Shack

item.media:title: Unrolled - City Of Palms Cigar Distribution Services
item.media:description: In this episode of Unrolled, host Sean Mobley visits City of Palm Cigar Distribution Services in Fort Myers, Florida, to explore the behind-the-scenes world of cigar distribution, highlighting the company's rapid growth and exclusive brand partnerships.
item.media:keywords: Lifestyle, Review, Travel, Documentary, Cigars City Of Palms Cigar Distribution Services

item.media:title: Unrolled - Cremo Cigars Little Havana
item.media:description: Sean visits the new Cremo Cigar Factory on Calle Ocho in Little Havana to tour the 19th-century-inspired space with owner Walter Santiago. They discuss the revitalization of the historic 1896 Cremo brand, the expansion of operations to the Dominican Republic to reach European markets, and new interactive experiences like custom cigar blending classes.
item.media:keywords: Lifestyle, Review, Travel, Documentary, Cremo Little Havana

item.media:title: Unrolled - Casa Habano Miami
item.media:description: Sean visits Casa Habano in Miami's Little Havana to explore the art of boutique cigar manufacturing with owner Rene Diaz. The episode covers the intricate rolling process, tobacco fermentation methods, and the defining differences between long and short filler cigars.
item.media:keywords: Lifestyle, Review, Travel, Documentary, Casa Habano Miami

item.media:title: Unrolled - Perdomo Cigars And Lounge
item.media:description: In this episode of Unrolled,Sean visits the Perdomo Cigars headquarters in Miami, Florida, to sit down with founder Nick Perdomo. The episode explores the intricate operations behind one of the industry's most respected brands, from their 12-year-old headquarters to their intensive production and quality control standards.
item.media:keywords: Lifestyle, Review, Travel, Documentary, Casa Habano Miami
